name: Stainless Steel Rolling Drying Rack - Brightroom™
description:
Add this Rolling Drying Rack from Brightroom™ to your sink area to help keep the dishes dry and clean. Made of metal, this trapezoid drying rack features slated rolling pins that helps release excess water from washed dishes into the sink. Plus, the freestanding mount type offers flexibility to install it easily on the sink.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
